data.title: Super Micro Surges 10% On Monday Pre-Market After Company Gets Nasdaq Extension To File Annual Report
data.description: The delay was initially announced in August when Super Micro postponed its annual report to evaluate internal controls over financial reporting.

data.title: This Six Flags Entertainment Analyst Begins Coverage On A Bullish Note; Here Are Top 5 Initiations For Monday
Tesla Stock Hits $400 In Overnight Trading On Robinhood Amid Analyst Upgrades And FSD Optimism
data.description: Tesla Inc. shares surged past $400 in overnight trading, reaching $401.16 as of 12:11 am EST Monday in New York, approaching its all-time high of $407.36 set in November 2021.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Narrows Down Winning And Losing Bets In The First 100 Days Of Trump Administration
data.description: Morgan Stanley sees potential growth in technology, natural gas, and defense sectors under Trump's 2024 win but flags risks from trade, fiscal, and regulatory challenges.

data.title: Ark Invest's Cathie Wood Hails Bitcoin's $100K Climb As A 'Big Deal,' Labels Apex Crypto As Gold Substitute And Emerging Reserve Currency
data.description: Renowned stock picker and founder of asset management giant Ark Invest, Cathie Wood, deemed Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) breach of the $100,000 mark a "big deal" on Sunday, hailing the leading cryptocurrency's rising prominence in the world of finance and investing.
